note: Machine-readable mirror of LEDGER.md, checked by the audit-ledger-coherent gate. A finding marked `fixed` must name the registered guardrail (gate) that enforces it; a dangling gate ref fails the gate so a guardrail can't be silently removed while the ledger claims the class is handled.

findings.title: Consumers never learn they're stale (no upgrade-staleness nudge)
Skills domain is a dead funnel (candidates detected, 0 ever applied)
34 dead event types accumulated with no disposition
Used as a discipline tracker, not an orchestrator
findings.note: Roadmap #12 (v1.80.0): capabilities tagged core vs orchestration in _tiers.mjs; command-tier-discipline enforces a valid layer on every verb; maddu audit positioning reports orchestration as an opt-in fire-rate, never dead. The finding (Máddu is used as a disciplined substrate, orchestration is opt-in) remains TRUE and intended — what's fixed is the false-alarm RECURRENCE: a re-audit can no longer read 'orchestration unused' as a dead domain.

findings.title: Releases v1.73.1-v1.74.2 bumped + merged but never git-tagged
